title: Glorpium
description: A Vault Hunters 3 (now not so silly) Resource Pack
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/5t5D2eH.png)

## Welcome to Glorpium!
This is just a simple name change and retexture of certain player related items. The idea was brought by the community and I just make it real. Hope everyone find this useful. Stay safe!

### Installation.

Use Modrinth App for a one click installation or follow the steps:

- Download the fille.
- Drop it inside your resourcepacks folder.
- Enable Glorpium inside your game.
- Enjoy!

### It's me, hi!

All my social media can be found here: [Danymaddox](https://linktr.ee/Danymaddox).

And if you like to add more gold, follow me here on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Danymaddox) and take a look, there's more comming soon.

![BisectHostingBanner](https://i.imgur.com/a5blp93.png)
